name: Sound Classification (SoundAnalysis)
antiPatterns: Adding trailing closures to SNClassifySoundRequest initializer
Accessing .animation or .accentColor on classifier objects — these are audio objects not SwiftUI views
Starting AVAudioEngine without installing a tap on the input node first
Forgetting to request microphone permission before audio capture
Creating SNAudioStreamAnalyzer with a format that doesn't match the audio engine input
